description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The exterior features a mix of gray stone and white surfaces, with large, rectangular windows providing ample natural light. The front includes a driveway leading to a covered garage, and a small landscaped area with greenery and shrubs. The rear of the house opens to a private backyard with a pool and patio area, partially enclosed by stone walls for privacy. The window arrangement is asymmetrical, with some floor-to-ceiling panes and others smaller and more regular. The overall aesthetic is minimalist, with sharp lines and a focus on open, functional spaces.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, gray stone and white exterior, large windows, a garage, and a backyard pool. The design is minimalist and geometric, with landscaped front and rear areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, garage, driveway, and landscaped front yard with large windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long stone wall, garage extension, and partial view of the backyard greenery.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard with a pool, patio, and large glass doors opening to the outdoor space.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage, driveway, and more of the backyard landscaping and pool area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a simple modern door, no porch, adjacent to a covered garage and landscaped area
